normalization.notes: Full Maya hieroglyphic text is not broadly available as normalized Unicode. Preserve sign labels, transliteration, catalog IDs, and any image or font references as separate reviewed fields.

segmentation.pedagogical_units: logograms, syllabograms, calendar signs, affixes, numerals, glyph blocks, and reviewed sign variants
segmentation.notes: Maya inscriptions use block layouts and reading order that cannot be inferred from left-to-right plain text. Treat sign labels and block order as curated data until app support exists.

sources.license: Unicode License reviewed for metadata use
sources.notes: Mayan numeral metadata only. This does not cover full Maya hieroglyphs.

sources.license: rights and reuse terms require review
sources.notes: Corpus and image references for domain discovery only. Do not ship drawings or exact text.

sources.notes: Introductory decipherment and sign-label reference for human research only.
Legacy Mayanist reference material for discovery and bibliography only.
